title: Nonogram Canonical Representation
description: Grid defined by row and column clues. Each clue is a list of positive integers representing consecutive filled-cell groups. An empty line uses [0].

rowClues.description: Array of length rows. Each element is an array of positive integers (or [0] for an empty row) representing consecutive filled-cell groups left to right.

colClues.description: Array of length cols. Each element is an array of positive integers (or [0] for an empty column) representing consecutive filled-cell groups top to bottom.
